TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Hali Camu Butul (Amilika a kamu: Harry James Potter; ci ŚďąŚą© Ť©ĻŚßÜ ś≥ĘÁČĻ ku hulam a kamu) u cay katatenga a tademaw a nisanga'an nu nikakilukilul a cudad, u "Hali Butul" a nikakilukilul a cudad nu misulitay ci JK Luling hananay. u cudacudad nu nisatahatahaw ni Hali Butul, mukilim cinida tu nikatinengan i cinidaan sa, u mapalaway ci Hali Butul, maydih malasakapahayay a mapalaway ci nida, u cudad nu nitanetanengan micudad nida i cacudadan u Hu-ke-wa-ce (Amilika a kamu: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry) sa, hikahetek ni Hali nanilecuh i 1980 a mihecaan 7 a bulled 31 a demoed, u wawa nu mapalaway ci Camu Butul(Amilika a kamu: ) atu Makoay a mapalaway ci Lili Butul, u masacacayay a wawa a tademaw, (masipulu'ay a wawa Áć®ÁĒüŚ≠ź) naspiyan ŚĎĹťĀč wayway atu micidekay nida aadihan nida i lalabu nu cudad, u masasibud tu butes ci Hali, mahida tu ci wama nida, u langdaway a kulit ku mata nida, mahida tu ci ina nida; i daw( izaw) ku cacayay a pildac nu duka, mahida u pirat-piyat i zais nida. makudus ku bihid ni Hali, wayway nida nikatinenegan tu midindicu daysan nida u kalisiw nida midindicuay a culay dumaay a tuud maydihay a limecedan == malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan ==
S.PHON: ńßar~…ĺi ¶amu butur~…ĺ (amir~…ĺika a kamu: ńßarrj *am…ôs pott…ôr; ¶i ** ** ** ku ńßur~…ĺam a kamu) u ¶aj katat…ôŇča a tad…ômaw a nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu nikakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ a ¶udad, u "ńßar~…ĺi butur~…ĺ" a nikakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ a ¶udad nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i *k r~…ĺur~…ĺiŇč ńßananaj. u ¶uda ¶udad nu nisatańßatańßaw ni ńßar~…ĺi butur~…ĺ, mukir~…ĺim ¶inida tu nikatin…ôŇčan i ¶inidaan sa, u mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i ńßar~…ĺi butur~…ĺ, majdińß mar~…ĺasakapańßajaj a mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i nida, u ¶udad nu nitan…ôtan…ôŇčan mi ¶udad nida i ¶a ¶udadan u ńßu-k…ô-wa- ¶…ô (amir~…ĺika a kamu: ńßogwarts s ¶ńßoor~…ĺ of wit ¶ńß ¶raft and wizardrj) sa, ńßikańß…ôt…ôk ni ńßar~…ĺi nanir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan * a bur~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd ** a d…ômo…ôd, u wawa nu mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i ¶amu butur~…ĺ(amir~…ĺika a kamu: ) atu makoaj a mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i r~…ĺir~…ĺi butur~…ĺ, u masa ¶a ¶ajaj a wawa a tad…ômaw, (masipur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a wawa ***) naspijan ** wajwaj atu mi ¶id…ôkaj nida aadińßan nida i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu ¶udad, u masasibud tu but…ôs ¶i ńßar~…ĺi, mańßida tu ¶i wama nida, u r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kur~…ĺit ku mata nida, mańßida tu ¶i ina nida; i daw( izaw) ku ¶a ¶ajaj a pir~…ĺda ¶ nu duka, mańßida u pirat-pijat i zais nida. makudus ku bińßid ni ńßar~…ĺi, wajwaj nida nikatin…ôn…ôgan tu midindi ¶u dajsan nida u kar~…ĺisiw nida midindi ¶uaj a ¶ur~…ĺaj dumaaj a tuud majdińßaj a r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdan == mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ==
S.FORM: Hali Camu Butul (Amilika a kamu: Harry James Potter; ci ŚďąŚą© Ť©ĻŚßÜ ś≥ĘÁČĻ ku hulam a kamu) u cay katatenga a tademaw a nisanga'an nu nikakilukilul a cudad, u "Hali Butul" a nikakilukilul a cudad nu misulitay ci JK Luling hananay. u cudacudad nu nisatahatahaw ni Hali Butul, mukilim cinida tu nikatinengan i cinidaan sa, u mapalaway ci Hali Butul, maydih malasakapahayay a mapalaway ci nida, u cudad nu nitanetanengan micudad nida i cacudadan u Hu-ke-wa-ce (Amilika a kamu: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry) sa, hikahetek ni Hali nanilecuh i 1980 a mihecaan 7 a bulled 31 a demoed, u wawa nu mapalaway ci Camu Butul(Amilika a kamu: ) atu Makoay a mapalaway ci Lili Butul, u masacacayay a wawa a tademaw, (masipulu'ay a wawa Áć®ÁĒüŚ≠ź) naspiyan ŚĎĹťĀč wayway atu micidekay nida aadihan nida i lalabu nu cudad, u masasibud tu butes ci Hali, mahida tu ci wama nida, u langdaway a kulit ku mata nida, mahida tu ci ina nida; i daw( izaw) ku cacayay a pildac nu duka, mahida u pirat-piyat i zais nida. makudus ku bihid ni Hali, wayway nida nikatinenegan tu midindicu daysan nida u kalisiw nida midindicuay a culay dumaay a tuud maydihay a limecedan == malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan ==
S.PHON: ńßar~…ĺi ¶amu butur~…ĺ (amir~…ĺika a kamu: ńßarrj *am…ôs pott…ôr; ¶i ** ** ** ku ńßur~…ĺam a kamu) u ¶aj katat…ôŇča a tad…ômaw a nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu nikakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ a ¶udad, u "ńßar~…ĺi butur~…ĺ" a nikakir~…ĺukir~…ĺur~…ĺ a ¶udad nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i *k r~…ĺur~…ĺiŇč ńßananaj. u ¶uda ¶udad nu nisatańßatańßaw ni ńßar~…ĺi butur~…ĺ, mukir~…ĺim ¶inida tu nikatin…ôŇčan i ¶inidaan sa, u mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i ńßar~…ĺi butur~…ĺ, majdińß mar~…ĺasakapańßajaj a mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i nida, u ¶udad nu nitan…ôtan…ôŇčan mi ¶udad nida i ¶a ¶udadan u ńßu-k…ô-wa- ¶…ô (amir~…ĺika a kamu: ńßogwarts s ¶ńßoor~…ĺ of wit ¶ńß ¶raft and wizardrj) sa, ńßikańß…ôt…ôk ni ńßar~…ĺi nanir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan * a bur~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd ** a d…ômo…ôd, u wawa nu mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i ¶amu butur~…ĺ(amir~…ĺika a kamu: ) atu makoaj a mapar~…ĺawaj ¶i r~…ĺir~…ĺi butur~…ĺ, u masa ¶a ¶ajaj a wawa a tad…ômaw, (masipur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj a wawa ***) naspijan ** wajwaj atu mi ¶id…ôkaj nida aadińßan nida i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu nu ¶udad, u masasibud tu but…ôs ¶i ńßar~…ĺi, mańßida tu ¶i wama nida, u r~…ĺaŇčdawaj a kur~…ĺit ku mata nida, mańßida tu ¶i ina nida; i daw( izaw) ku ¶a ¶ajaj a pir~…ĺda ¶ nu duka, mańßida u pirat-pijat i zais nida. makudus ku bińßid ni ńßar~…ĺi, wajwaj nida nikatin…ôn…ôgan tu midindi ¶u dajsan nida u kar~…ĺisiw nida midindi ¶uaj a ¶ur~…ĺaj dumaaj a tuud majdińßaj a r~…ĺim…ô ¶…ôdan == mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ==
